reason: Approved design defines rollout scope, parity audit, install projection, and non-goals.
Implementation must execute rollout steps in order and update step status.
Requirement explains user-visible template rollout and installation projection capability.
Roadmap defines Template Rollout Module and final item sequencing.
All executable workflow contracts are hard constraints for final rollout verification.
Onboard skeleton and managed-reference list are core rollout targets.
Install projection text must describe the pure-skills Pi package accurately.
Pi package manifest must expose skills only; runtime adapters are deferred outside core.
Claude plugin metadata must remain valid and must not falsely claim hook support.
Rollout maintenance rules should live in onboard reference template.
